prompt: A photorealistic high-end fashion magazine cover titled "{argument name="magazine title" default="LUMINA"}" in large white serif letters at the top. The cover features a portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="beautiful young woman with shoulder-length wavy brown hair"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="white blazer over a black silk camisole"}, accessorized with gold hoop earrings and a delicate gold necklace. She is looking directly at the camera with a confident, elegant expression against a textured warm grey studio backdrop. On the left side, black text reads "THE NEW ERA OF AI BEAUTY" and a larger headline "{argument name="main headline" default="STYLE EVOLUTION"}". On the right side, white text reads "FUTURE FASHION" and "WHAT'S NEXT?". At the bottom, white text reads "BEAUTY SECRETS OF TOMORROW" and "{argument name="bottom text" default="ELEGANT & CHIC"}". Professional studio lighting, soft shadows, highly detailed.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级写实的高端时尚杂志封面，顶部以醒目的白色衬线字体显示标题“{argument name="magazine title" default="LUMINA"}”。封面主体为一位 {argument name="subject description" default="留着齐肩棕色波浪卷发的年轻美女"} 的肖像，她身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="黑色丝绸吊带背心外搭白色西装外套"}，佩戴金色圆环耳环和精致的金色项链。她正视镜头，表情自信优雅，背景为质感十足的暖灰色摄影棚背景。左侧黑色文字写着“THE NEW ERA OF AI BEAUTY”，下方是更大的标题“{argument name="main headline" default="STYLE EVOLUTION"}”。右侧白色文字写着“FUTURE FASHION”和“WHAT'S NEXT?”。底部白色文字写着“BEAUTY SECRETS OF TOMORROW”和“{argument name="bottom text" default="ELEGANT & CHIC"}”。专业摄影棚灯光，柔和阴影，细节丰富。

breakdown.creativeCore: 时尚杂志封面肖像：生成一张包含时尚肖像和可自定义排版的照片级写实时尚杂志封面。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
